title: Nicephore
description:
Nicephore: Better Screenshots
- Screenshot to clipboard
- Screenshots GUI
- Gallery GUI
- Save as JPEG
- Lossless optimisation
body:
**Take better screenshots in Minecraft.**

Nicephore enhances Minecraft's built-in screenshot system with a full-featured gallery, image optimization, and clipboard integration — all without leaving the game.

---

### Gallery

Browse all your screenshots in an infinite-scroll gallery with a clean sidebar layout. Thumbnails load on-the-fly, so it handles hundreds or even thousands of screenshots without breaking a sweat.

- **Infinite scroll** — no more clicking through pages
- **Sort by date** — newest or oldest first, with subtle day separator lines
- **Filter by format** — show PNG, JPEG, or both
- **Hover info** — date and file size on mouse-over
- **Configurable grid** — auto-fit or set 2–6 columns

### Screenshot Management

- **Detail view** — view any screenshot full-size with one click
- **Copy to clipboard** — copy screenshots directly (Windows & macOS)
- **Rename** — rename screenshots from the detail view
- **Trash system** — move screenshots to trash instead of deleting permanently, with restore and auto-cleanup after 30 days
- **Bulk operations** — select multiple screenshots and trash them at once

### Image Optimization

Nicephore can automatically optimize your screenshots for smaller file sizes with no quality loss:

- **PNG optimization** via [oxipng](https://github.com/shssoichiro/oxipng)
- **JPEG creation** — optionally save a compressed JPEG copy alongside the PNG for easy sharing
- **JPEG optimization** via [ECT](https://github.com/nicophare/ECT)

### Keybindings

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `Ctrl+C` | Copy last screenshot to clipboard |
| `Ctrl+S` | Open screenshot detail view |
| `Ctrl+G` | Open gallery |

### Configuration

All settings are accessible in-game via the gallery sidebar:

- Toggle JPEG creation
- Toggle optimization
- Toggle clipboard auto-copy
- Toggle custom screenshot message
- Adjust gallery column count
- Set PNG optimization level
- Set JPEG compression quality

---

**Client-side only.** No server required.
